description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a predominantly orange fuselage and a sleek, streamlined design. The cockpit is enclosed with a large, light blue-tinted canopy, positioned at the front of the fuselage. The wings are mounted mid-fuselage and are swept back, giving the aircraft a dynamic, modern appearance. The tail features a V-tail configuration with two angled stabilizers, and the engine is mounted at the rear, emitting a faint glow suggestive of a jet or rocket propulsion system. The surface of the airplane is smooth and hard, with visible panel lines and subtle shading that accentuates its aerodynamic form. The airplane appears to be floating above a dark, stylized shadow or water reflection, emphasizing its separation from the ground.
description: A compact, orange airplane with a sleek, enclosed cockpit, swept mid-mounted wings, and a V-tail. The rear-mounted engine glows faintly, and the surface is smooth and streamlined.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, large blue canopy, and swept-back wings with the V-tail visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, rear-mounted engine, and the angular V-tail; the cockpit canopy and wing sweep are clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the V-tail configuration, engine exhaust, and the symmetry of the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cockpit, wing, and tail structure with the engine glow at the rear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two angled stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a large, blue-tinted canopy.
